categories.name: query_churn
categories.evidence: Agent issued 9 distinct search queries ('session config', 'cookie settings', 'flask session', 'session interface', 'SecureCookieSession', 'session_cookie_name', 'cookie domain', 'session backend', 'permanent session') without reading any search results.

categories.name: retrieval_failure
categories.evidence: Despite 9 search queries, the target file flask/sessions.py was never opened.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: query churn combined with retrieval failure. The agent searched extensively but never read results.
